name: Cranberry Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Broiler or fryer chicken cut
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake the chicken pieces in a bag with seasoned flour.
2. Heat oil in a skillet, then sauté the chicken, turning once to brown.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients and pour over the chicken.
4. Cover and cook slowly for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
From "Make It Better with CRANBERRIES"
Cape Cod Cranberry Growers' Association, Founded 1888
P.O. Box 270
Carver, MA 02330
